name: ChatGPT
description: OpenAI's AI assistant Tool: https://chat.openai.com/. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #837 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map ChatGPT output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target

parameters.name: file
